home.title: LKR DJ TOOL
home.subtitle: Download tracks and convert audio in club quality — all on your computer.
home.downloadDesc: Download from YouTube, SoundCloud and Spotify as MP3 or WAV.
home.convertDesc: Convert multiple files to MP3, WAV, FLAC or M4A.

downloader.title: Rip Music
downloader.subtitle: Paste a link and download in high quality
downloader.beatportHint: Downloads straight from Beatport and delivers WAV, ready to play.
downloader.beatportConnectDesc: Beatport works through Telegram. Connect once and you're set.
downloader.spotifyHint: We find the same track automatically for you.

errors.invalidUrl: That link doesn't look valid. Check and try again.
errors.failed: We couldn't download right now. Try another link.
errors.tools: The app needs to be reinstalled. Close and open again.

converter.title: Convert Audio
converter.subtitle: Transform multiple files at once
converter.dropzoneHint: You can select multiple at once

errors.unsupported: One of the files isn't supported

telegram.title: Telegram account
telegram.subtitle: Required to download from Beatport
telegram.why: Beatport is fetched through a Telegram bot. Connect your account once — your data stays on your computer only.
telegram.step1Desc: Get your free API ID and API Hash from Telegram's site (takes 1 minute).
telegram.step2Desc: We sent a code to your Telegram. Type it below.
telegram.step3Desc: Your account has two-step verification. Enter your password.
telegram.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Check the details and try again.

library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Everything you downloaded lives here
library.emptyHint: Tracks you download will show up here. You can drag them straight into your DJ software.
library.dragHint: Tip: drag any track straight into Rekordbox, Serato or Finder.

settings.title: Settings
settings.needsAttention: Something needs attention — reopen the app
settings.disclaimer: Use only music you have the right to download.
